sourceMovie.title: The Strangers: Prey at Night
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto The Strangers: Prey at Night (2018) as a horror theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Halloween
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Strangers: Prey at Night clicked for you, Halloween (1978) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Strangers: Prey at Night?
faq.answer: Try Halloween, Halloween, The Hills Have Eyes—each shares DNA with The Strangers: Prey at Night while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Strangers: Prey at Night?
faq.answer: The Strangers: Prey at Night (2018) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Strangers: Prey at Night part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Strangers Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
